title: Cursed Loot
description: This mod adds random curses to loot you can find
body:
Integrates the loot system from the game Moonlighter to Minecraft. Upon loading a world for the first time after installing the mod you'll get a base chest. This is the chest that'll be utilized for the mod.

After going out and amassing loot which contain curses you have to manage your inventory wisely. Upon getting to your base and in proximity of the Base Chest. The curses will go into effect!

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"
